Video.summary: Michael and Larken Letchworth set out on a new adventure, exploring food fishing and the great outdoors. This father son duo are making memories that will last a lifetime and will forever be etched in the digital world.
Video.title: "The Beginning"

Video.summary: Huge Sheepshead lurk in Jersey's waters. Nick heads out with Capt. Dan Schafer to ply trophy sheeps from the bridge pilings.
Video.title: "Counting Monster Sheepshead"

Video.summary: It’s been 60 years since AA was introduced to the shooting sports world. Since that day, an immeasurable number of AA hulls have hit the ground and countless shooters have stood center stage raising a trophy where millions of dollars have been won. Professional and recreational shooters alike have trusted AA for six decades. In this episode, load up for stories of high school, collegiate competitors and the world’s best as they bust clays with the legendary shot shell. - GUESTS: Zach Keenbaum (Team Winchester) Desi Edmunds (Team Winchester) Kayla Wilgus (Team Winchester) Amy Cawley (Team Winchester) Anthony Matarese (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Six Decades Of Dominance"

Video.summary: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchester’s best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. We’ll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.
Video.title: "Clays With Purpose"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through the mountains of western North Carolina, where we stop in Asheville and Cashiers!!
Video.title: "Dry Fly Fishing HEAVEN (Wild Trout)"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair heads out to the very first spot we ever filmed a BWO show, with the first guide ever on BWO Capt. John Beach. - This time they're catching sheepshead, hopefully nobody gets bit this time.
Video.title: "Catching Convicts"

Video.summary: David Blanton heads to South Florida to kickoff another season of Realtree's Spring Thunder! Osceola turkeys are known to be some of the most aggressive of the wild turkey subspecies, but unusually hot weather conditions have the birds tight-lipped and timid.
Video.title: "Turkey Season Kickoff | South Florida Osceola Fog Gobbler"

Image.alt: "Turkey Season Kickoff | South Florida Osceola Fog Gobbler"
"Turkey Season Kickoff | South Florida Osceola Fog Gobbler"
"Turkey Season Kickoff | South Florida Osceola Fog Gobbler"

Video.summary: PCB Fishing report author Nathan Chennaux joins Capt. Justin - scanning the beach waters for tarpon and hooks into a monster while maneuvering around storms and vacationers. Does it get to the boat?
Video.title: "Live Fishing Report"

Video.summary: Joined by PCB’s Artificial Reef Coordinator Erin Graham Capt Justin - fish previously dropped reefs before sinking the famed BLACK PEARL from iconic films right off Panama City Beach, FL.
Video.title: "Black Pearl’s Final Resting Place"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: Continuing on with his quest for The North America Deer Slam, Mark Peterson packs his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle for a hunt in Mexico targeting the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail from elevated blinds. The outfitter here has done an amazing job managing the deer numbers and age groups to grow giant whitetails. Mark is anticipating the pre-rut will get these big bucks moving.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton and Turkeys for Tomorrow (TFT) sweepstakes winner Jaryd Hurst hunt South Texas Rios. The two are hunting with Legends of the Fall's Mike McFerrin, and his daughter, Georgia Kate, on their ranch in Texas.
Video.title: "March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"

Image.alt: "March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"
"March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"
"March Rios Are Falling | A South Texas Double"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike and Dallas King take advantage of a powerful summer tide, hooking into an all-out redfish frenzy where the action never slows down.
Video.title: "King Tide"

Video.summary: Across the country, deer season to many Americans is a rite of passage. For generations, Winchester has been the trusted ammunition choice for hunters…and it’s been a decade since the game-changing Deer Season XP whitetail line was introduced. In this episode, we’ll celebrate the many successes by Team Winchester hunters in the field during whitetail and mule deer firearm seasons across the United States. - GUESTS: Melissa Bachman (Team Winchester) Mark Drury (Team Winchester) Nikki Boxler (Team Winchester) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester) Jason Gilbertson (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Decade Of Deer Season"

Video.summary: The mission of Shoot United is to be a content resource for millions of shooters and a place where people can learn, build confidence and find ways to participate. Through films, educational videos and articles, SU has impacted countless shooters all over the world. In this episode, join Shoot United Ambassadors as they inspire and educate through a series of instructional videos and stories in pistol, self-defense, trap and skeet and sporting clays. - GUESTS: Thea Van Sync (Team Winchester) Callie Farill (Team Winchester) Becky Yackley (Team Winchester) Theo Ribbs (Team Winchester) Jessica Hook (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Shooting United"

Video.summary: Illinois isn’t the first state you think about when it comes to waterfowl, but the Wentz Brothers have dialed in some honey holes over the years. On this episode, a slew of waterfowl experts put to the test some of the newest Winchester waterfowl ammunition during the great migration of the Mississippi Flyway in early December. We’ll also head north to the shores of Kodiak Island, Alaska with Chris and Casey Keefer as they push the limits of Winchester’s new Last Call Double Shot on fast-ripping sea ducks. - GUESTS: Zach Wentz (Team Winchester) Nathan Robinson (Winchester Ammunition) Ryan Swaner (Winchester Repeating Arms) Chris Jennings (Ducks Unlimited) Mike Brasher (Ducks Unlimited) Scott Olmsted (American Hunter) Travis Hall (Field & Stream) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Flight Proven"

Video.summary: Col. Nick Nichols from Folds of Honor and Olympic skeet shooter Dania Vizzi are both proud Americans who have represented their country overseas. Col. Nichols commanded the air in the cockpit of a fighter jet for countless missions during his seven combat tours and Dania donned the stars and bars proudly on her shooting vest as an Olympian in Paris. Now with Winchesters in hand, both are in the Midwest whitetail woods during late November during the back end of the rut hoping to connect on a Missouri monarch.
Video.title: "The Colonel & The Olympian"

Video.summary: Today, Capt. Danny is in Stuart, FL. Joined by 16-year-old angler, Denton Potter. The two are targeting the local bridge dwelling giants, while going “Beyond The Surface” into Denton’s story.
Video.title: "Young Gun"

Video.summary: Every season, just like clockwork, mission-driven longboards gobble their way across the plains of South Dakota, the cornfields of Iowa, the timbered ridges of Michigan and the cattle ground of Kansas looking for their soulmates in one of the most celebrated hunting seasons in America…the wild turkey breeding season. Join Team Winchester as they stalk, call, flank and roost boss gobblers into range from coast to coast.
Video.title: “Lovesick Longbeards”

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials, John and Bert work to - gut and re-foam the stingers in the classic 200 Aquasport project. John visits the experts at Marine Surplus to search for a new center console. Finally, we learn about new carpeting options on the classic Glastron project and get expert marine hardware tips.
Video.title: Essentials - "Stringer Re-Foaming & Rebuilding Boats with Surplus"

Image.alt: Essentials - "Stringer Re-Foaming & Rebuilding Boats with Surplus"
Essentials - "Stringer Re-Foaming & Rebuilding Boats with Surplus"
Essentials - "Stringer Re-Foaming & Rebuilding Boats with Surplus"

Video.summary: Things get western in Florida for Phillip Culpepper while hunting Osceola turkeys. Plus, sometimes, the smell of bacon can make you forget about the turkeys.
Video.title: "Turkey Hunt Gets Western?!? | Florida Osceola Turkey Hunting"

Image.alt: "Turkey Hunt Gets Western?!? | Florida Osceola Turkey Hunting"
"Turkey Hunt Gets Western?!? | Florida Osceola Turkey Hunting"
"Turkey Hunt Gets Western?!? | Florida Osceola Turkey Hunting"

Video.summary: Turkey season is officially in full swing. Phillip Culpepper heads to Mississippi to meet up with old friends and hunt the season opener. After scouting up a flock of turkeys the day before, Culpepper sets up the next morning and works a longbeard right into the decoys. Shortly after, producer Matt Garger buys his license and is up-to-bat.
Video.title: "Two Gobblers Down! | Phillip Culpepper Hunts Mississippi Opener"

Image.alt: "Two Gobblers Down! | Phillip Culpepper Hunts Mississippi Opener"
"Two Gobblers Down! | Phillip Culpepper Hunts Mississippi Opener"
"Two Gobblers Down! | Phillip Culpepper Hunts Mississippi Opener"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton heads to South Carolina to hunt with new friends Scott and Jackson Richardson. Blanton is behind the lens filming the father-and-son hunt turkeys on their family land. This happens all while "Hooks" the lab waits quietly in the buggy. Watch this great hunt.
Video.title: "Birds In The Burn | Hunting South Carolina Turkeys"

Image.alt: "Birds In The Burn | Hunting South Carolina Turkeys"
"Birds In The Burn | Hunting South Carolina Turkeys"
"Birds In The Burn | Hunting South Carolina Turkeys"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.
Video.title: "LA Tuna Pt 1"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his quest on the Hearst Ranch in California. Next up on the list, California Aoudad. These Aoudad were introduced to the ranch in the early 1920s and have thrived ever since.
Video.title: "Chasing Giant Aoudad In California"

Video.summary: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch
Video.title: RMEF - "Better Than We Found It"

Video.summary: This episode of Huckberry Homes brings us out to the Western Slope, just a few miles outside of Vail, Colorado to visit our longtime friend and collaborator Sinuhe Xavier. When he's not traveling the world shooting commercials and making short films, Xavier's at home in his quiet, perfectly appointed retreat deep in the Rockies here he's a three hour drive from Red Rock desert and a ten minute drive from some of the best snowboarding in the world. There was plenty of magic in Sinuhe's spot, from his BMW GS to his exploration of how his love for his son shaped the design and decoration of his pad.
Video.title: "Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Ep. 7 Sinuhe Xavier"

Image.alt: "Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Ep. 7 Sinuhe Xavier"
"Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Ep. 7 Sinuhe Xavier"
"Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Ep. 7 Sinuhe Xavier"

Video.summary: This episode of Huckberry Homes brings us out to the Western Slope, just a few miles outside of Vail, Colorado to visit our longtime friend and collaborator Sinuhe Xavier. When he's not traveling the world shooting commercials and making short films, Xavier's at home in his quiet, perfectly appointed retreat deep in the Rockies here he's a three hour drive from Red Rock desert and a ten minute drive from some of the best snowboarding in the world. There was plenty of magic in Sinuhe's spot, from his BMW GS to his exploration of how his love for his son shaped the design and decoration of his pad.
Video.title: "Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"

Image.alt: "Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"
"Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"
"Inside This Adventure Filmmaker's Gear Garage & Colorado Home | Sinuhe Xavier"

Video.summary: Shot through the neck on Fort Hood in Texas, Green Beret John Arroyo recounts coming face to face with his attacker and Jesus blinding his would be killer.
Video.title: "John Arroyo"

Video.summary: The Southards are heads to Table Rock for the annual family vacation. Receding water poses a challenge but there’s no lack of fish or laughs at the lake!
Video.title: "Table Rock Tradition"

Video.summary: Go to Tamarack Island and catch Muskies - that’s the plan!
Video.title: "Bucktail Muskies"

Video.summary: Qualifier 2 for the BaitFuel Fishing Tour is back in Quinte West, Ontario where the teams will fish this Largemouth Bass Only event on the water of the Bay of Quinte.
Video.title: BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"

Image.alt: BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"
BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"
BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 2 - Quinte West, Ontario"

Video.summary: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.
Video.title: "A Newfound Passion"

Video.summary: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.
Video.title: "Lonestar Redfish"

Video.summary: Nick visits Key Largo to search out backwater battles with snook, reds, trout and surprises in Florida Bay with Capt. Bruce Davis.
Video.title: "Key Largo Florida Bay Adventure"

Video.summary: JP takes his largemouth flipping technique to the mangroves of Florida Bay.
Video.title: "Flipping the Salt"

Video.summary: Despite adverse conditions, Capt. Jonathan Moss and long time friend, Capt. Adam Whitson, are heading out on the water in search of the Crystal River Inshore Slam.
Video.title: "Weather or Not"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike navigates South Carolina’s breathtaking marsh, seizing a brief window when the seasonal high tide floods the grass, bringing incredible fishing.
Video.title: "Flood Tide"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff get bit by catfish in Southern Oklahoma with YouTuber Nate Williams of Adrenaline Rush Adventures while using the most primitive fishing tactic - hand fishing. Learn from the Chickasaw Nation about the history of this method that has been used by Native Americans for thousands of years.
Video.title: "Oklahoma Catfish Noodling"

Video.summary: Mike has had some challenging hunts for turkeys in Colorado. This trip was really not any different with plenty of highs and lows. Thankfully, on Day 5 luck favored on his side. Checkout this unique bowhunt for Colorado Hybrid Rios!
Video.title: "DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"

Image.alt: "DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"
"DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"
"DIY Colorado Hybrid Gobbler Bowhunt – Tagged Out!"

Video.summary: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Gold Star Youth Turkey"

Video.summary: From time to time you have moments that will change the way think about something. That is what happened for us while hunting the Scimitar Oryx with Republic Outdoors. Hunting is more than harvesting animals, it’s conservation, and in this story, we learn how a species nearly extinct gets another chance to live.
Video.title: "A Story Of Restoration"

Video.summary: This is the story of how FE Hill ranch got it's start. From its inception, FE Hill has created opportunities for people to experience the outdoors and create memories. For us, it has created a tradition of Fathers and Sons hunting together.
Video.title: "The Hill"

Video.summary: David Blanton heads down to southern Florida for the opening weekend of turkey season. Will he score? Let's find out.
Video.title: "Osceola Wild Turkeys | Opening Weekend In South Florida"

Image.alt: "Osceola Wild Turkeys | Opening Weekend In South Florida"
"Osceola Wild Turkeys | Opening Weekend In South Florida"
"Osceola Wild Turkeys | Opening Weekend In South Florida"

Video.summary: On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we caught our good friend and photographer James Barkman out in the wild. He gave us a tour of his vintage "Yellow Submarine" inspired VW Van and broke down some of the modifications he has made to make this adventure bus feel more like home.
Video.title: "Full Vintage Van Tour | Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van | James Barkman"

Image.alt: "Full Vintage Van Tour | Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van | James Barkman"
"Full Vintage Van Tour | Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van | James Barkman"
"Full Vintage Van Tour | Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van | James Barkman"

Video.summary: "On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we caught our good friend and photographer James Barkman out in the wild. He gave us a tour of his vintage ""Yellow Submarine"" inspired VW Van and broke down some of the modifications he has made to make this adventure bus feel more like home.
Video.title: "How This Photographer Crafted His Vintage Adventure Van | Ep. 8 James Barkman"

Image.alt: "How This Photographer Crafted His Vintage Adventure Van | Ep. 8 James Barkman"
"How This Photographer Crafted His Vintage Adventure Van | Ep. 8 James Barkman"
"How This Photographer Crafted His Vintage Adventure Van | Ep. 8 James Barkman"

Video.summary: Low turkey population densities and the rocky, steep terrain of New York State's Adirondack Mountains create a unique spring turkey hunting challenge only found in this region of the country. It's not always easy to find wild turkeys here, but when you can, there is always the chance that this bird has never been hunted making success particularly special.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "New York BIG WOODS Hunting | Adirondack Spring Turkey Strategy | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Kylee Short, an Orlando based bass angler, shares how she discovered fishing later in life. This LBP Spotlight highlights her journey on the water and strong family support.
Video.title: "Kylee Short"

Video.summary: When Justin and Meredith stay positive after a series of bad breaks, it pays off in fun. If fun means fish. After all, we are in Panama City Beach.
Video.title: "Positive = Good Day"

Video.summary: LBP Spotlights Clay Shidler and the history of his charter business, Hang'Em High Sportfishing.
Video.title: "Clay Shidler"

Video.summary: In the series premiere, Julie embarks on an exhilarating journey to Costa Rica alongside two enthusiastic friends. Determined to land a monster first yellowfin tuna, Julie pushes her limits—not only guiding her friends to hook their inaugural catch, but also aiming to surpass her personal best: a remarkable 180-pound yellowfin.
Video.title: "Bait Balls"

Video.summary: Josh and his wife Anna celebrate the first day of summer by taking their daughters out for a fun-filled day on the water.
Video.title: "Family Day"

Video.summary: Join us boating down some of America’s Beaches in Pinellas County, FL. Starting at Anclote Key to Ft. Desoto Park, we Island Hop, Kayak, Bike & exploring Culinary delights.
Video.title: "“Boatcation” Cruising Down America’s Best Beaches In Florida"

Image.alt: "“Boatcation” Cruising Down America’s Best Beaches In Florida"
"“Boatcation” Cruising Down America’s Best Beaches In Florida"
"“Boatcation” Cruising Down America’s Best Beaches In Florida"

Video.summary: Join us “Riding Dirty” at Hog Waller down deep in the mud Florida style in Putnam County, FL. Misty and Hudson try a new style of fishing “shooting docks” Crappie fishing and she lands a monster on the river.
Video.title: "Riding Dirty And Catching Crappie In Putnam County"

Image.alt: "Riding Dirty And Catching Crappie In Putnam County"
"Riding Dirty And Catching Crappie In Putnam County"
"Riding Dirty And Catching Crappie In Putnam County"
